title: Tender Crunchy Polish Yukon Gold Potatoes Pilaf
description: A fresh and crunchy Polish dish featuring Yukon gold potatoes, perfect for a nostalgic meal. This ovo-vegetarian friendly pilaf is a great side dish or light lunch.

ingredients.name: candy pieces
ingredients.notes: such as M&M's or chopped peanut butter cups

instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the grated carrots and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the diced potatoes, salt, and pepper, and cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the sugar and candy pieces, and stir to combine.
Continue cooking for an additional 5 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender and lightly browned.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
Let cool completely before refrigerating or freezing.
Reheat as needed, adding a little water if the pilaf seems dry.
